ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P
